framework.name: Multi-Agent Payment Orchestration
framework.description: An architectural pattern that separates agent responsibilities into specialized roles (interaction, recommendation, payment execution) coordinated through a shared orchestration layer, rather than using a single monolithic agent with all permissions.
framework.raw_quote: Instead of one monolithic agent responsibilities were separated. Interaction agents handled customer engagement. Recommendation agents focused on product selection. Payment agents executed transactions. All agents were coordinated through a shared orchestration layer.

source.title: How to Integrate Agentic Commerce into Payment Systems
